scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run db:generate -w server && concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.docker:up:local: docker compose --env-file compose.env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.build.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose --env-file compose.env down && node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['data/postgres','data/uploads']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})" && docker compose --env-file compose.env pull && docker compose --env-file compose.env up -d
scripts.docker:reset:local: docker compose --env-file compose.env down && node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['data/postgres','data/uploads']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run docker:up:local
